entries.statement: A synthesis concentrates reasoning into a document, so when any part of it is wrong the whole document and everyone who trusted it are wrong together.

canonical.statement: A synthesis concentrates reasoning into a document, so when any part of it is wrong the whole document and everyone who trusted it are wrong together.

entries.statement: The one financial constraint fixed at protocol level is that penalties trigger on provable fault only, never on being wrong or unpopular.

canonical.statement: The one financial constraint fixed at protocol level is that penalties trigger on provable fault only, never on being wrong or unpopular.

instructions: This bundle is a proposal that passed the origin kernel's gate structurally; it is not admitted anywhere. To submit it, open a pull request carrying the bundle to a target kernel: the target's own suite re-runs the gate over the patch, admission is the target's act, and semantic judgement of whether the cited support holds of the world is its community's, never asserted here.
